name: Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement (MNDA) Standard Terms, allowing two parties to disclose confidential information to each other for an agreed purpose.

name: Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement Cover Page
description: Cover page that incorporates the Common Paper Mutual NDA Standard Terms by reference; parties fill in bracketed deal terms and sign the cover page to execute the agreement.

name: Cloud Service Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Cloud Service Agreement (CSA) Standard Terms for selling and buying cloud software and SaaS products, covering service access, payment, confidentiality, warranties, and liability.

name: Design Partner Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Design Partner Agreement for giving an early customer access to a product in exchange for feedback to help develop and improve it.

name: Service Level Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Service Level Agreement (SLA) Standard Terms, designed to be used with the Cloud Service Agreement to define uptime targets, response times, and service credits.

name: Professional Services Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Professional Services Agreement (PSA) Standard Terms for engaging a services provider under one or more statements of work (SOWs).

name: Data Processing Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Data Processing Agreement (DPA) Standard Terms governing the processing of personal data between a business and its service provider, including international data transfer terms.

name: Software License Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Software License Agreement Standard Terms for licensing on-premise or self-hosted software, covering license grants, support, payment, warranties, and liability.

name: Partnership Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Partnership Agreement Standard Terms for establishing a business partnership between two companies, including collaboration terms, IP, and confidentiality.

name: Pilot Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Pilot Agreement, a short-term contract allowing a prospective customer to trial a product or service before committing to a longer-term deal.

name: Business Associate Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Business Associate Agreement (BAA) Standard Terms required under HIPAA when a vendor handles protected health information on behalf of a covered entity.

name: AI Addendum
description: Common Paper standard AI Addendum Standard Terms for adding artificial intelligence and machine learning terms to an existing commercial agreement.
